Notice Of Motion To Stay The Deposition And Quash The Deposition Notices Of Dr. S Dan Weymouth And Jane Wardzinska And For Monetary Sanctions; And Notice Of Automatic Stay Of Deposition Pending Hearing On The Motion
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
KEITH J. FERRARA, ESQ. for plaintiff and moving party: DENISE HOOK
SABRINA BERDUX, ESQ. for defendant and opposing party: JOHN KRATSAS

AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF DENISE HOOK's Motion To Stay The Deposition And Quash The Deposition Notices Of Drs. Dan Weymouth And Jane Wardzinska is granted. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
